## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and team structure changes.](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is evolving team structure; Aida introduced as new managing editor POC for Webstacks](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Content performance shows positive trends; 132 articles published, 90k impressions, 275 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Agreed to ramp up content production to 15 articles/week, focusing on UX design, redesign, and CMS comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [New content strategy to explore AI-ready website stacks and programmatic SEO opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [132 articles published](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [90,000 impressions this week (slight increase)](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [275 clicks (slight decrease from last week)](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [UX topics performing best (4 out of top 5 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Several articles appearing in "People Also Ask" sections](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [One article showing in AI overview for website performance](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

### Team Structure Changes

  - [Aida introduced as new managing editor for Webstacks account](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Transitioning to pod structure with managing editors leading strategy](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Andrej transitioning to other roles; Kyle still involved in process](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [New structure to be fully implemented after New Year](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Agreed to increase production from 10 to 15 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Focusing on UX design, redesign, and CMS comparison topics](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Scrapping e-commerce cluster due to low relevance for Webstacks](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Exploring new cluster around AI-ready website stacks and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
  - [Aligning content with Webstacks' asset creation (guides, webinars, calculators)](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### SEO and Content Opportunities

  - [Targeting lower volume, higher intent keywords for bottom-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Expanding CMS comparison articles to include more platforms](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Focusing on relating SEO topics back to website design and development](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Exploring content around AI-powered content generation and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)

### Asset Integration

  - [New assets being developed (e.g., budget calculator tool)](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Plan to update older articles with new, relevant assets and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [Creating comprehensive guides to complement existing content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Team to prioritize UX design, redesign, and CMS comparison topics for upcoming content](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [GrowthX to ramp up content production to 15 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Webstacks to keep content inventory updated with new assets and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/BYCfF1Ms7sGtL2coTmABzixxz_yNkJhg?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
